subject: [RFC PATCH 7/8] dax/kmem: add the ltpin opt-in (CAP_LTPIN) for private nodes

2026-07-22.patch_summary: This patch adds an opt-in setting called 'ltpin' for private nodes in the Linux kernel's DAX (Direct Access) subsystem. The ltpin setting allows long-term GUP pins to target the node's folios, which is necessary because these pins block migration and hot-unplug indefinitely. Without this opt-in, such pins would be refused on a private node unless it explicitly enables the 'ltpin' feature.
